verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We were foreigners In relation to Israel, We were foreign To be born again, We were strangers in relation To God, the Creator, But now we are sons of God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But now, But now we are no more, We are no more strangers and foreigners, We were born by grace by faith, We are the temple of the Lord, We are the head, We are the sons of God.
